title: Detect PII in application log output
description: Given log samples containing various PII types, the skill should identify each instance, classify it, and recommend redaction approaches.
prompt:
Review these application log samples for PII exposure and recommend sanitization:

```
2025-01-15 10:23:45 INFO  UserService: Created user john.doe@example.com with ID 12345
2025-01-15 10:23:46 DEBUG PaymentService: Processing payment for card ending 4242, full number 4111111111111111, CVV 123
2025-01-15 10:23:47 ERROR AuthService: Login failed for user SSN=123-45-6789, IP=192.168.1.100
2025-01-15 10:23:48 INFO  OrderService: Shipping to John Doe, 123 Main St, Springfield IL 62704, phone (555) 123-4567
2025-01-15 10:23:49 WARN  APIGateway: Rate limit exceeded for API key sk_live_abc123def456ghi789
```

assertions.description: Must identify email address PII in the UserService log line
Must identify full credit card number and CVV as critical PII
Must identify SSN as critical PII requiring immediate remediation
Must recommend specific redaction or masking approach
Must identify the exposed API key as a secret/credential leak

title: Design GDPR-compliant data masking for a non-production environment
description: Given a database schema with PII fields, the skill should produce a GDPR-compliant masking strategy for creating safe non-production datasets.
prompt:
Design a GDPR-compliant data masking strategy for our staging environment. Here is the database schema:

```sql
CREATE TABLE users (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  first_name VARCHAR(100),
  last_name VARCHAR(100),
  date_of_birth DATE,
  phone VARCHAR(20),
  ssn_encrypted BYTEA,
  address_line1 VARCHAR(255),
  city VARCHAR(100),
  postal_code VARCHAR(10),
  country VARCHAR(2)
);

CREATE TABLE orders (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT REFERENCES users(id),
  total_amount DECIMAL(10,2),
  shipping_address TEXT,
  payment_token VARCHAR(255)
);

CREATE TABLE support_tickets (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT REFERENCES users(id),
  subject VARCHAR(255),
  body TEXT,
  agent_notes TEXT
);
```

Staging must have realistic data for testing but no real PII. We serve EU customers.

assertions.description: Must reference GDPR requirements for data masking
Must specify masking strategy for email addresses
Must recommend format-preserving masking or synthetic data generation
Must address free-text fields (support ticket body, agent notes) as requiring NLP-based or full replacement masking
Must address maintaining referential integrity across masked tables
